channel.title: Moonlit Social Labs — dev://portfolio
channel.description: Case studies, devlogs, and dispatches from Michael Wylde — solo developer building AI-augmented applications across intelligence, research, education, cybersecurity, lifestyle, and civic technology.

item.title: Case Study: Deep Seer — Open-Source Intelligence Platform
item.description: How one developer built an enterprise-grade OSINT platform with 90+ live data sources, a 3D globe, court-ready evidence packaging, and the statistical rigor to prove what it finds.

item.title: Case Study: The Archive — Comparative Religion Research Platform
item.description: 83 research tools across 12 categories bridging 22 sacred texts and 14 traditions with a 50,000-node knowledge graph and four modes of AI reasoning.

item.title: Case Study: PsyStat Nexus — AI-Powered Behavioral Science Statistics
item.description: 240+ statistical methods for behavioral science. An AI advisor that understands psychology research. Mobile-first. Publication-ready output.

item.title: Case Study: AstroDeep — Citizen Science Astrology Platform
item.description: 55+ statistical engines, a falsification engine, blind testing, and three prediction systems competing for accuracy. The instrument, not the belief.

item.title: Case Study: Study Break — The Study App That Replaced Six Others
item.description: How a student-athlete with ADHD built a 65+ feature study platform powered by AI that reads your actual course materials.

item.title: Case Study: Entropic Tarot — Physical Entropy Meets Ancient Wisdom
item.description: The first tarot app powered by true physical entropy from device sensors. Cryptographically provable shuffles. 535 years of tradition.

item.title: Case Study: Filament — Persuasion Intelligence Platform
item.description: 271 persuasion techniques. Real NLP, real graph algorithms, real statistics. Teaches influence, detects manipulation, provides tools to design and counter operations.

item.title: Case Study: Dystopian Daily News — AI-Powered Satirical News
item.description: 8 AI journalist personas. Semantic clustering. Multi-stage pipeline detecting dystopian patterns across international sources. The farce is the frame. The facts are sacred.

item.title: Case Study: FixThisFaster — Civic Infrastructure Accountability
item.description: 50+ features turning pothole reports into government accountability through community verification, AI analysis, and automated legal escalation.
